item.title: Who's SHE?
item.description: The profession deserves better than the one letter we keep performing.

item.title: About Safety Mic
item.description:
Safety Mic is an HSE publication focused on the Nigerian workplace. It covers compliance culture, field safety practice, regulatory context, and the human side of risk management.

Written by Michayah Iniovosa, Hardware Technician and HSE professional based in Lagos.
